title: acalypha subsana
intro: Acalypha subsana, also known as bitter leaf or bittermelde, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. Acalypha subsana has been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as to support digestion and boost the immune system, offering several health benefits. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to create ointments, salves, and other topical preparations.
